steps.title: Spot the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is “Objects,” which is plural. Although an appositive phrase interrupts after it, the subject's number doesn't change.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires verbs to match the number of their subjects. Choice D, “exhibit,” is the plural form that matches the plural subject “Objects.” Options A, B, and C all use singular verbs, violating this rule. That matches choice D — D is correct.
